global.description: The ad features a bold offer with a clear call to action on a bright yellow background.

elements.label: yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold, large text stating '2-for-1 tonight' in a dark font, centrally positioned.

elements.label: Additional offer details
elements.description: Smaller text below the headline that reads 'Fresh favorites nearby' in a dark font.

elements.label: Discount percentage
elements.description: A small badge displaying '-30%' in a prominent dark font, positioned at the bottom left.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Learn more' in a dark font, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo for 'SnapMeal' in a dark font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in a white font, located at the top left corner.

elements.label: Discount icon
elements.description: A small icon indicating a discount, positioned at the bottom left.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element that does not fit into the defined roles.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, 2-for-1 offer, SnapMeal logo
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the center, the logo is at the top left, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: 2-for-1 tonight, Fresh favorites nearby, SnapMeal, Learn more, 30%, UGC
